description: Implement a database audit logging system on the 'customers' table in the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_triggers.db) using a DBeaver connection named 'ChinookTriggers'. Create an 'audit_log' table with columns for log_id (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY), table_name (TEXT), operation (TEXT), record_id (INTEGER), old_values (TEXT), new_values (TEXT), and changed_at (TEXT). Configure three AFTER triggers on the 'customers' table to log INSERT (record_id=NEW.CustomerId, new_values=FirstName/Email), UPDATE (record_id=OLD.CustomerId, old_values=OLD.Email, new_values=NEW.Email), and DELETE (record_id=OLD.CustomerId, old_values=OLD.FirstName/Email) operations. Execute test operations by inserting a new customer (Id: 60, Name: Alice Wonderland, Email: alice@wonderland.com, Address: 123 Rabbit Hole), updating CustomerId 1's email to 'luis.goncalves@updated.com', and deleting CustomerId 60. Export the 'audit_log' table to /home/ga/Documents/exports/audit_log.csv and save the SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/audit_triggers.sql.
